purpose: Define what current Agent Lab review identity can prove before enterprise authentication, reviewer roles, and brand/category access controls are connected.
guardrails: Prototype review labels support local workflow only; they are not enterprise approvals.
Review actions cannot bypass disabled capability gates.
Source promotion and source claim review state must not become canonical evidence without source-owner governance.
Artifact review can mark prototype readiness, but export and circulation stay disabled by capability gates.
caveats: Current review records use a generic human_review label rather than authenticated user identity.
Enterprise reviewer identity, role, access, retention, and audit export remain future requirements.
